instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppShortcuts API to add a custom shortcut.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 SplitView API to create a three-column layout.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new NotificationBanner API to show a banner.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 SleepTracking API to display sleep quality.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new RemoteControl API to show remote status.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new EyeTracking API to show gaze coordinates.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of structs with a Bool property to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a String property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Double values to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Strings to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Double property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite sport, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite city, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a RAM usage percentage, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a heart rate zone, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite genre, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a detected scene name, configurable via AppIntent.
